event.title: Our first three years with Ada in Pesaro, Italia

body.p: On Friday, 29 May, at 10.00 am, we will come together – young and not so young – to celebrate the Ada & Zangemann themed workshops held over the past three years, which have helped to promote the culture of free hardware and software in primary schools.
The event will take the format of a recap of all the workshops and moments of sharing, where the older participants have learnt much more from the younger ones.
Needless to say, in addition to the 52 primary school children, the 7 teachers who will accompany them, my 14 pupils, and the headteachers of the two schools, there will be ice cream for everyone!
It may not be Bonissi(mo), but it will be of excellent.
Because we, at FSFE Pesaro, do the things properly.
